name: delighted
description: Reads Delighted survey responses, people, bounces, unsubscribes, and aggregate metrics through the Delighted REST API; can create/update and delete people.

risk.read: external Delighted API read of survey responses, people, and aggregate NPS metrics
risk.write: creates/updates Delighted people and deletes existing people
risk.approval: reverse-ETL writes require plan preview and approval token
